mapper.select: SELECT film_id, title, description, release_year, language_id, original_language_id, rental_duration, rental_rate, length, replacement_cost, rating, last_update, special_features, fulltext FROM film ORDER BY title

SELECT film_id, title, description, release_year, language_id, original_language_id, rental_duration, rental_rate, length, replacement_cost, rating, last_update, special_features, fulltext FROM film WHERE film_id = #{filmId}

SELECT film_id, title, description, release_year, language_id, original_language_id, rental_duration, rental_rate, length, replacement_cost, rating, last_update, special_features, fulltext FROM film WHERE fulltext @@ to_tsquery('english', #{keyword}) ORDER BY ts_rank(fulltext, to_tsquery('english', #{keyword})) DESC

SELECT f.film_id, f.title, f.description, f.release_year, f.language_id, f.original_language_id, f.rental_duration, f.rental_rate, f.length, f.replacement_cost, f.rating, f.last_update, f.special_features, f.fulltext FROM film f WHERE f.film_id = #{filmId}

SELECT f.film_id, f.title, f.description, f.release_year, f.language_id, f.original_language_id, f.rental_duration, f.rental_rate, f.length, f.replacement_cost, f.rating, f.last_update, f.special_features, f.fulltext FROM film f WHERE f.film_id = #{filmId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO film (title, description, release_year, language_id, original_language_id, rental_duration, rental_rate, length, replacement_cost, rating, last_update, special_features, fulltext) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{releaseYear}, #{languageId}, #{originalLanguageId}, #{rentalDuration}, #{rentalRate}, #{length}, #{replacementCost}, #{rating, typeHandler=com.ogagila.typehandler.MpaaRatingTypeHandler}, COALESCE(#{lastUpdate}, now()), #{specialFeatures, typeHandler=com.ogagila.typehandler.StringArrayTypeHandler}, #{fulltext}) RETURNING film_id
mapper.update: UPDATE film SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, release_year = #{releaseYear}, language_id = #{languageId}, original_language_id = #{originalLanguageId}, rental_duration = #{rentalDuration}, rental_rate = #{rentalRate}, length = #{length}, replacement_cost = #{replacementCost}, rating = #{rating, typeHandler=com.ogagila.typehandler.MpaaRatingTypeHandler}, last_update = now(), special_features = #{specialFeatures, typeHandler=com.ogagila.typehandler.StringArrayTypeHandler}, fulltext = #{fulltext} WHERE film_id = #{filmId}
mapper.select: WITH overdue_rentals AS ( SELECT r.rental_id, r.rental_date, r.return_date, r.inventory_id, r.customer_id, EXTRACT(DAY FROM (now() - r.rental_date)) AS days_rented FROM rental r WHERE r.return_date IS NULL ) SELECT f.film_id, f.title, f.rental_duration, f.special_features, COUNT(ovr.rental_id) AS overdue_count, CASE WHEN f.special_features IS NOT NULL AND f.special_features @> ARRAY['Trailers'] THEN 'Has Trailers' ELSE 'No Trailers' END AS trailer_info, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(ovr.rental_id) DESC) AS overdue_rank FROM overdue_rentals ovr JOIN inventory i ON ovr.inventory_id = i.inventory_id JOIN film f ON i.film_id = f.film_id WHERE ovr.days_rented > f.rental_duration GROUP BY f.film_id, f.title, f.rental_duration, f.special_features ORDER BY overdue_count DESC

WITH film_rentals AS ( SELECT f.film_id, f.title, fc.category_id, COUNT(r.rental_id) AS rental_count FROM film f JOIN inventory i ON f.film_id = i.film_id JOIN rental r ON i.inventory_id = r.inventory_id LEFT JOIN film_category fc ON f.film_id = fc.film_id GROUP BY f.film_id, f.title, fc.category_id ) SELECT film_id, title, rental_count, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY rental_count DESC) AS rank, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY category_id ORDER BY rental_count DESC) AS category_rank FROM film_rentals ORDER BY rank LIMIT #{topN}
